zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Wynnington I於1225年出生在英國爾特維姆洛福時，他的父親Liulph de Twemlow36歲，母親Mrs. Liulph de Twamlowe Croxton36歲。他於1256年之前與Margery de Wynnington在英國爾文寧頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1295年在英國爾文寧頓享年70歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Wynnington I于1225年出生在英国爾特維姆洛福时，他的父亲Liulph de Twemlow36岁，母亲Mrs. Liulph de Twamlowe Croxton36岁。他于1256年之前与Margery de Wynnington在英国爾文寧頓结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1295年在英国爾文寧頓享年70岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Wynnington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: (i) locative name from Wennington (Hunts, Essex). (ii)  see  Winnington  .

variants.name: Winnington
meanings: English: (i) locative name from Winnington (Cheshire, Staffs). (ii)  see  Wennington  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Wynnington I was born in 1225, in Twemlow, Cheshire, England, his father, Liulph de Twemlow, was 36 and his mother, Mrs. Liulph de Twamlowe Croxton, was 36. He married Margery de Wynnington before 1256, in Winnington, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1295, in Winnington, Cheshire, England, at the age of 70.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Wynnington I est né en 1225, à Twemlow, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Liulph de Twemlow, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Liulph de Twamlowe Croxton, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Margery de Wynnington avant 1256, à Winnington, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1295, à Winnington, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 70 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Wynnington I 1225 in Twemlow, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Liulph de Twemlow 36 und seine Mutter Mrs. Liulph de Twamlowe Croxton 36. Er hat vor 1256 in Winnington, Cheshire, England Margery de Wynnington geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1295 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Winnington, Cheshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Wynnington I è nato il nel 1225 nel Twemlow, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Liulph de Twemlow, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Mrs. Liulph de Twamlowe Croxton, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Margery de Wynnington prima del 1256, nel Winnington, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1295, nel Winnington, Cheshire, England, all'età di 70 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Wynnington Iが1225年にイギリスチェシュアイアトウエムロウで生まれた時，父Liulph de Twemlowは36歳，母Mrs. Liulph de Twamlowe Croxtonは36歳であった。1256年以前にイギリスチェシュアイアウィニントンでMargery de Wynningtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1295年にイギリスチェシュアイアウィニントンで70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Wynnington I(이)가 1225년 영국 체실르 트w로에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Liulph de Twemlow(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Liulph de Twamlowe Croxton(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1256년 이전 영국 체실르 윈잉턴에서 Margery de Wynnington(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1295년 영국 체실르 윈잉턴에서 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Wynnington I nasceu em 1225, em Twemlow, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Liulph de Twemlow, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Mrs. Liulph de Twamlowe Croxton, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery de Wynnington antes 1256, em Winnington, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1295, em Winnington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 70 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Wynnington I родился в 1225 г. в местности твемлоу, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Liulph de Twemlow было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Liulph de Twamlowe Croxton, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery de Wynnington перед 1256 г. в местности виннингтон, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1295 г. в местности виннингтон, чешир, Англия в возрасте 70 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Wynnington I nació en 1225, en Twemlow, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Liulph de Twemlow, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Mrs. Liulph de Twamlowe Croxton, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Margery de Wynnington antes de 1256, en Winnington, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1295, en Winnington, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 70 años.
